title: Playing to the Audiences: How Creative Producers Manage and Reconcile Different and Copresent Valuation Standards
abstract: This study examines how individual creative producers navigate conflicting valuation standards when multiple audience types are copresent. Drawing on a multiyear participant-observation study of stand-up comedy in Los Angeles, I introduce practical annealing as a real-time, cue-driven competency through which performers reconcile heterogeneous standards across casual consumers, peers, and gatekeepers. Practical annealing unfolds through three situated practices: audience profiling (inferring likely sensibilities from contextual and interactional cues), audience orchestration (forging a workable collective from disparate evaluators), and audience triangulation (surfacing overlaps and selectively prioritizing standards to guide performance choices). I show that the latitude to anneal is not uniform. Permission structures rooted in demographic prototyping and status expand or restrict what moves are legible and sanctionable. Although enacted within moments on stage, repeated reconciliations aggregate into career orientations—toward broad malleability or niche grounding—with implications for bookings, visibility, and market position. Conceptually, the paper shifts attention from evaluators to the subjects of evaluation, specifying real-time practices for managing evaluative plurality under copresence and distinguishing it from sequential experimentation or improvisation. The framework clarifies when and for whom real-time reconciliation is feasible and how microinteractional skill scales into durable trajectories in cultural production and other audience-dependent work.
title_cn: 迎合观众：创意制作人如何管理和调和不同的、共同存在的价值标准
abstract_cn: 本研究探讨了个体创意生产者在多种观众类型共存时如何应对相互冲突的价值评估标准。基于对洛杉矶单口喜剧的多年参与观察研究，我引入了“实用退火”这一概念，作为一种实时的、基于线索的能力，帮助表演者在休闲消费者、同行和把关者之间调和异质标准。实用退火通过三种情境实践展开：观众画像（从上下文和互动线索中推测可能的感性）、观众编排（从不同评估者中锻造出一个可行的集体）和观众三角测量（揭示重叠并有选择性地优先考虑标准以指导表演选择）。我展示了退火的自由度并不均匀。根植于人口特征原型和地位的许可结构扩展或限制了哪些举动是可识别和可制裁的。尽管这些调和在舞台上的瞬间内进行，但反复的调和会聚合成职业取向——朝向广泛的可塑性或小众的扎根——这对演出安排、可见性和市场地位具有重要影响。从概念上讲，本文将注意力从评估者转向评估的主体，明确了在共存环境下管理评估多元性的实时实践，并将其与顺序实验或即兴创作区分开来。该框架阐明了何时以及对谁而言实时调和是可行的，以及微观互动技能如何在文化生产和其他依赖观众的工作中转化为持久的轨迹。

title: The Effect of Board Leadership Roles and Committee Responsibilities on Governance Effectiveness
abstract: Abstract Expectations for corporate directors have expanded over time, placing growing demands on their time and attention. Drawing on the cognitive foundations of the attention‐based view (ABV), we theorize that board directors' leadership roles and committee assignments shape their attentional perspective and engagement in ways that can both hinder and enhance governance effectiveness. Using a panel dataset of 39,610 board‐committee‐year observations from over 3000 US boards between 1999 and 2023, we examine how directors' roles and responsibilities relate to governance outcomes associated with boards' audit, compensation, and nomination committees. We find that holding more board‐leadership roles and board‐committee assignments may impose cognitive burdens that undermine governance effectiveness, whereas holding more‐diversified committee assignments may enhance governance by enabling directors to sequence their attention more strategically across governance tasks. This examination thus advances our theoretical understanding of how attention functions when distributed across multiple organizations simultaneously. In addition, by moving beyond simple counts of board directorships to explicitly consider the number and configuration of directors' leadership roles and committee responsibilities, this study advances the literature on governance effectiveness and board design. In doing so, we highlight the value of committee‐level analysis for understanding board dynamics and governance.
title_cn: 董事会领导角色与委员会职责对治理有效性的影响
abstract_cn: 摘要 随着时间的推移，企业董事的期望不断扩大，对他们的时间和注意力提出了越来越高的要求。基于注意力视角（ABV）的认知基础，我们理论化地认为，董事的领导角色和委员会任命在塑造他们的注意力视角和参与方式上，既可能阻碍也可能增强治理的有效性。通过分析1999年至2023年间来自3000多个美国董事会的39,610个董事会-委员会-年度观察数据，我们考察了董事的角色和责任与董事会审计、薪酬和提名委员会相关的治理结果之间的关系。我们的研究发现，担任更多董事会领导角色和委员会任命可能会带来认知负担，从而削弱治理的有效性，而担任更多多样化的委员会任命则可能通过使董事能够更战略性地安排他们在治理任务上的注意力，来增强治理。因此，本研究推进了我们对注意力在多个组织同时分配时如何运作的理论理解。此外，通过超越简单的董事会职务数量统计，明确考虑董事的领导角色和委员会责任的数量与配置，本研究推动了关于治理有效性和董事会设计的文献发展。在此过程中，我们强调了委员会层面分析在理解董事会动态和治理中的价值。

title: The devil in the detail: how can environmental justice improve theorization for sustainable supply chain management?
abstract: Purpose Sustainable supply chain management (SSCM) research has often adopted instrumental logic whereby sustainability helps defend profitability. Recently, environmental justice (EJ) has been proposed as grounds for a new approach to SSCM. This research aims to explore Schlosberg’s environmental justice framework to aid theorization via the empirical investigation of a major international supply chain sustainability initiative. Design/methodology/approach Using multimodal critical discourse analysis, the authors examined 142 videos published by the Roundtable on Sustainable Palm Oil, a multi-stakeholder initiative (MSI) actively promoting elements of EJ across multiple supply chain levels. Findings EJ principles (distributional, recognitional, procedural and the capability approach) are strongly embedded in the MSI discourse but operationalized as instrumental. This means achieving EJ is seen as helping to defend profitability. The study further found various contradictions presented in the EJ discourse and that public policy interventions, notably the 2023 European Union Deforestation-free Products Directive, have been seen as risking EJ, leading to concern. The interplay between instrumental profit-maximization and noninstrumental public goals (e.g. on climate and biodiversity) for advancing supply chain justice are discussed to aid future research. Originality/value This study provides empirical evidence on how environmental justice is framed and enacted through instrumental propositions. This counters prior claims suggesting justice is inherently noninstrumental. Furthermore, evidence on how EJ outcomes are affected by changes to public policy highlights the importance of mandatory requirements.
topics: Global trade, sustainability, and social impact
title_cn: 细节中的魔鬼：环境正义如何改善可持续供应链管理的理论化？
abstract_cn: 目的：可持续供应链管理（SSCM）研究通常采用工具理性，认为可持续性有助于维护盈利能力。最近，环境正义（EJ）被提出作为一种新的SSCM方法的基础。本研究旨在探索施洛斯伯格的环境正义框架，通过对一个主要国际供应链可持续性倡议的实证研究来辅助理论化。设计/方法论：通过多模态批判性话语分析，作者分析了142个由可持续棕榈油圆桌会议发布的视频，该多方利益相关者倡议（MSI）积极推动环境正义在多个供应链层面的元素。发现：环境正义原则（分配性、识别性、程序性和能力方法）在该MSI话语中深深扎根，但被工具化地运用。这意味着实现环境正义被视为有助于维护盈利能力。研究进一步发现，环境正义话语中存在各种矛盾，并且公共政策干预，特别是2023年欧盟无森林砍伐产品指令，被视为对环境正义构成风险，引发了担忧。讨论了工具性利润最大化与非工具性公共目标（例如气候和生物多样性）之间的相互作用，以促进供应链正义的进展，为未来研究提供帮助。原创性/价值：本研究提供了关于环境正义如何通过工具性命题被框定和实施的实证证据。这反驳了之前声称正义本质上是非工具性的观点。此外，关于环境正义结果如何受到公共政策变化影响的证据突显了强制性要求的重要性。

title: Correction to “Getting to the core of locus of control: Is it an evaluation of the self or the environment?” by Johnson et al. (2015).
abstract: Reports an error in "Getting to the core of locus of control: Is it an evaluation of the self or the environment" by Russell E. Johnson, Christopher C. Rosen, Chu-Hsiang (Daisy) Chang and Szu-Han (Joanna) Lin (Journal of Applied Psychology, 2015[Sep], Vol 100[5], 1568-1578; see record 2015-05390-001). In the article, numerous root-mean-square error of approximation (RMSEA) values were incorrectly reported. The authors no longer have access to the data to verify against the original output but confirmed that corrections were required after manual recalculations. These errors affect several conclusions reached and indicate the need to temper some of the specific conclusions reached in the discussion section. The corrected RMSEA values are present in the erratum. (The following abstract of the original article appeared in record 2015-05390-001). Responding to criticisms surrounding the structural validity of the higher order core self-evaluations (CSE) construct, in the current study we examined the appropriateness of including locus of control as an indicator of CSE. Drawing from both theoretical and empirical evidence, we argue that locus of control is more heavily influenced by evaluations of the environment compared with the other CSE traits. Using data from 4 samples, we demonstrate that model fit for the higher order CSE construct is better when locus of control is excluded versus included as a trait indicator and that the shared variance between locus of control and CSE is nominal. This does not mean that locus of control is irrelevant for CSE theory though. We propose that evaluations of the environment moderate the relations that CSE has with its outcomes. To test this proposition, we collected data from 4 unique samples that included a mix of student and employee participants, self- and other-ratings, and cross-sectional and longitudinal data. Our results revealed that locus of control moderated relations of CSE with life and job satisfaction, and supervisor-rated job performance. CSE had stronger, positive relations with these outcomes when locus of control is internal versus external. These findings broaden CSE theory by demonstrating one way in which evaluations of the environment interface with evaluations of the self. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 对Johnson等人（2015）“深入探讨控制源的核心：它是对自我还是环境的评估？”的更正。
abstract_cn: 报告了Russell E. Johnson、Christopher C. Rosen、Chu-Hsiang (Daisy) Chang和Szu-Han (Joanna) Lin在《应用心理学杂志》（2015年9月，第100卷，第5期，1568-1578页）中发表的文章“深入探讨控制源的核心：是自我评估还是环境评估”中的错误（见记录2015-05390-001）。在该文章中，多个均方根误差近似值（RMSEA）被错误报告。作者目前无法访问数据以验证原始输出，但在手动重新计算后确认需要进行更正。这些错误影响了多个结论，并表明需要对讨论部分得出的某些具体结论进行适度调整。更正后的RMSEA值已在勘误表中列出。（以下是原始文章的摘要，出现在记录2015-05390-001中）。针对围绕高阶核心自我评估（CSE）构念的结构效度的批评，本研究考察了将控制源作为CSE指标的适宜性。基于理论和实证证据，我们认为控制源受到环境评估的影响程度较其他CSE特质更大。使用来自4个样本的数据，我们展示了在将控制源排除作为特质指标时，高阶CSE构念的模型拟合优于将其纳入时，并且控制源与CSE之间的共享方差是微不足道的。然而，这并不意味着控制源对CSE理论无关紧要。我们提出，环境评估调节CSE与其结果之间的关系。为了验证这一命题，我们收集了来自4个独特样本的数据，这些样本包括学生和员工参与者、自我评估和他人评估，以及横断面和纵向数据。我们的结果显示，控制源调节了CSE与生活满意度、工作满意度和主管评定的工作表现之间的关系。当控制源为内在时，CSE与这些结果之间的关系更强、更积极。这些发现通过展示环境评估与自我评估之间的相互作用，拓宽了CSE理论。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）。

title: The paradox of structural empowerment: How and when structural empowerment fuels psychological entitlement and undermines resource sharing.
abstract: In recent decades, many organizations have been restructuring in ways that formally decentralize the necessary resources, information, and sociopolitical support, which is labeled "structural empowerment." Although prior research suggests that structural empowerment enhances resource exchanges, I challenge this conventional wisdom by theorizing its potential drawbacks for resource sharing. Integrating the evolutionary perspective of work design and the dominance-prestige model, I developed a comprehensive model of how and when structural empowerment can hinder employees' resource sharing via psychological entitlement. I employed multiwave (Study 1) and multisource (Studies 2 and 3) field surveys and experimental methodology (Study 4) to test my hypotheses. The results reveal that dominance-oriented individuals are more likely to feel entitled in response to structural empowerment. Moreover, psychological entitlement decreases resource sharing. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 结构赋权的悖论：结构赋权如何以及何时助长心理权利感并削弱资源共享。
abstract_cn: 近年来，许多组织以正式去中心化的方式重组必要的资源、信息和社会政治支持，这被称为“结构性赋权”。尽管先前的研究表明，结构性赋权可以增强资源交换，但我对这一传统观点提出质疑，理论化其在资源共享方面的潜在缺陷。通过整合工作设计的进化视角和主导-声望模型，我开发了一个全面的模型，探讨结构性赋权如何以及何时通过心理特权阻碍员工的资源共享。我采用了多波次（研究1）和多来源（研究2和3）现场调查以及实验方法（研究4）来检验我的假设。结果显示，主导导向的个体在面对结构性赋权时更容易感到有特权。此外，心理特权降低了资源共享。

title: Correction to “Does trust matter more in virtual teams? A meta-analysis of trust and team effectiveness considering virtuality and documentation as moderators” by Breuer et al. (2016).
abstract: Reports an error in "Does trust matter more in virtual teams? A meta-analysis of trust and team effectiveness considering virtuality and documentation as moderators" by Christina Breuer, Joachim Hüffmeier and Guido Hertel (Journal of Applied Psychology, 2016[Aug], Vol 101[8], 1151-1177; see record 2016-25877-001). In the article, the formula used to calculate t values to examine categorical moderators for the association between team trust and task performance is incorrect. This error is reflected in Table 3, and the correct t values are shown below. The second and third sentences in Footnote 12 are also incorrect. The corrected Table 3 is present in the erratum. (The following abstract of the original article appeared in record 2016-25877-001). Team trust has often been discussed both as requirement and as challenge for team effectiveness, particularly in virtual teams. However, primary studies on the relationship between trust and team effectiveness have provided mixed findings. The current review summarizes existing studies on team trust and team effectiveness based on meta-analytic methodology. In general, we assumed team trust to facilitate coordination and cooperation in teams, and therefore to be positively related with team effectiveness. Moreover, team virtuality and documentation of interactions were considered as moderators of this relationship because they should affect perceived risks during teamwork. While team virtuality should increase, documentation of interaction should decrease the relationship between team trust and team effectiveness. Findings from 52 studies with 54 independent samples (representing 12,615 individuals in 1,850 teams) confirmed our assumptions. In addition to the positive overall relationship between team trust and team effectiveness criteria (ρ = .33), the relationship between team trust and team performance was stronger in virtual teams (ρ = .33) as compared to face-to-face teams (ρ = .22), and weaker when team interactions were documented (ρ = .20) as compared to no such documentation (ρ = .29). Thus, documenting team interactions seems to be a viable complement to trust-building activities, particularly in virtual teams. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 对Breuer等人（2016）“信任在虚拟团队中是否更重要？考虑虚拟性和文档作为调节变量的信任与团队效能的元分析”的更正。
abstract_cn: 报告了Christina Breuer、Joachim Hüffmeier和Guido Hertel在《应用心理学杂志》（2016年8月，第101卷，第8期，1151-1177页）中发表的文章“信任在虚拟团队中是否更为重要？关于信任与团队效能的元分析，考虑虚拟性和文档化作为调节变量”的错误（见记录2016-25877-001）。在该文章中，用于计算t值以检验团队信任与任务表现之间关系的分类调节变量的公式不正确。此错误在表3中有所体现，正确的t值如下。脚注12中的第二句和第三句也不正确。更正后的表3已在勘误中列出。（以下是原文摘要，出现在记录2016-25877-001中）。团队信任常常被讨论为团队效能的要求和挑战，特别是在虚拟团队中。然而，关于信任与团队效能之间关系的主要研究结果不一。本次综述总结了基于元分析方法的现有团队信任与团队效能研究。一般而言，我们假设团队信任能够促进团队中的协调与合作，因此与团队效能呈正相关。此外，团队的虚拟性和互动文档化被视为这一关系的调节变量，因为它们应影响团队合作中的感知风险。虽然团队虚拟性应增加，但互动文档化应降低团队信任与团队效能之间的关系。来自52项研究的54个独立样本（代表12,615名个体，分布在1,850个团队中）的结果证实了我们的假设。除了团队信任与团队效能标准之间的正相关关系（ρ = .33），在虚拟团队中，团队信任与团队表现之间的关系（ρ = .33）强于面对面团队（ρ = .22），而在有文档化的团队互动中，这一关系（ρ = .20）则弱于没有文档化的情况（ρ = .29）。因此，文档化团队互动似乎是信任建设活动的一个可行补充，尤其是在虚拟团队中。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）。

title: The many facets of leadership: A meta-analysis of personality facets, leader effectiveness, and emergence.
abstract: Personality traits can be useful predictors of leader effectiveness and emergence. Although these traits are recognized as important, existing research has neglected the potential advantages of considering personality at the facet level to clarify and extend theory regarding how personality relates to leader outcomes, as well as improve the use of personality as a predictor of leader effectiveness and emergence. This meta-analysis examines how narrow personality dimensions relate to leader emergence and effectiveness across theoretically relevant contextual differences including leader hierarchical level and organization type. A final set of k = 203 data sets was analyzed to examine these relationships. The results of this work highlight that personality facets vary substantially in their relationships to leader effectiveness and emergence. This variability can be used to advance theory regarding specific personality-leader outcomes relations and to improve the prediction of leader outcomes when the effects of facets are considered in regression weighted composites. The results also suggest that certain facets' validities differ in student samples or depending on a leader's hierarchical level within an organization. This work contributes to understanding regarding when and why narrow dimensions of personality may be useful to consider in relation to leader outcomes and helps clarify distinctions between traits relevant for leader emergence and leader effectiveness. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 领导的多面性：关于人格特质、领导效能与领导者出现的元分析。
abstract_cn: 个性特征可以有效预测领导者的有效性和出现。尽管这些特征被认为很重要，但现有研究忽视了在细分层面考虑个性的潜在优势，以阐明和扩展个性与领导者结果之间关系的理论，并改善个性作为领导者有效性和出现的预测因素的使用。本元分析考察了狭义个性维度如何与领导者的出现和有效性相关，涵盖了理论上相关的背景差异，包括领导者的层级水平和组织类型。最终分析了 k = 203 个数据集，以研究这些关系。这项工作的结果强调，个性细分在与领导者有效性和出现的关系上存在显著差异。这种变异性可以用于推进关于特定个性与领导者结果关系的理论，并在回归加权组合中考虑细分效应时改善领导者结果的预测。结果还表明，某些细分在学生样本中或根据领导者在组织中的层级水平，其有效性存在差异。这项工作有助于理解何时以及为何狭义的个性维度在与领导者结果相关时可能有用，并帮助澄清与领导者出现和领导者有效性相关的特征之间的区别。（PsycInfo数据库记录 (c) 2026 APA，版权所有）。

title: Who benefits from board quotas? Intersectional disparities and the moderating role of experience for women directors in India.
abstract: Although gender quotas are gaining increasing popularity, evidence on their effectiveness is mixed. While some studies set in Western contexts suggest a positive impact on women's board representation, others demonstrate backlash. Further, because this research primarily treats women as a singular, homogenous group, it overlooks critical intersectionality issues on boards, limiting our understanding of how quotas may shape the outcomes of women directors from marginalized groups. We contribute to this growing scholarly debate on quota effectiveness by examining the outcomes of women directors from both dominant and marginalized groups. Drawing on the instrumental perspective on legitimacy and intersectionality research, we propose that although all women directors gain additional board appointments compared to men when quotas are implemented, marginalized women experience intersectional disadvantages that result in their lower appointment rates compared to dominant women. Importantly, we show that prior executive or independent director experience acts as a powerful equalizer, enabling marginalized women directors to overcome these barriers and close their opportunity gap. We test our hypotheses in the context of India's gender quota policy using archival data on all men and women directors from dominant and marginalized groups (i.e., gender and religion or caste) serving on the boards of the National Stock Exchange (NSE)1500-listed firms from 2013 to 2017 and shed light on the underlying mechanisms using qualitative insights from 37 interviews with directors. Our mixed-methods field data capture real-world board dynamics and maximize ecological validity to provide critical policy implications. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
topics: Innovations and Analysis in Business and Education
title_cn: 谁从董事会配额中受益？交叉性差异及经验对印度女性董事的调节作用。
abstract_cn: 尽管性别配额越来越受到欢迎，但关于其有效性的证据却不尽相同。一些在西方背景下进行的研究表明，性别配额对女性董事会代表性产生了积极影响，而另一些研究则显示了反弹现象。此外，由于这些研究主要将女性视为一个单一的、同质的群体，忽视了董事会中关键的交叉性问题，从而限制了我们对配额如何影响边缘群体女性董事结果的理解。我们通过考察来自主流和边缘群体的女性董事的结果，为这一日益增长的关于配额有效性的学术辩论做出贡献。基于对合法性工具性视角和交叉性研究的借鉴，我们提出，尽管在实施配额时所有女性董事相比男性获得了更多的董事会任命，但边缘女性面临交叉性劣势，导致她们的任命率低于主流女性。重要的是，我们展示了以往的高管或独立董事经验作为一种强有力的平衡因素，使边缘女性董事能够克服这些障碍，缩小她们的机会差距。我们在印度性别配额政策的背景下测试我们的假设，使用2013年至2017年期间在国家证券交易所（NSE）1500家上市公司董事会中服务的所有男性和女性董事（即按性别和宗教或种姓划分的主流和边缘群体）的档案数据，并通过对37位董事的访谈获得的定性见解揭示潜在机制。我们的混合方法实地数据捕捉了真实的董事会动态，并最大限度地提高了生态有效性，从而提供了重要的政策启示。

title: Correction to “When ethical leader behavior breaks bad: How ethical leader behavior can turn abusive via ego depletion and moral licensing” by Lin et al. (2016).
abstract: Reports an error in "When ethical leader behavior breaks bad: How ethical leader behavior can turn abusive via ego depletion and moral licensing" by Szu-Han (Joanna) Lin, Jingjing Ma and Russell E. Johnson (Journal of Applied Psychology, 2016[Jun], Vol 101[6], 815-830; see record 2016-06820-001). In the article, several root-mean-square error of approximation (RMSEA) values were incorrectly reported. The authors no longer have access to the data to verify against the original output but confirmed that corrections were required after manual recalculations. In all cases, the correct RMSEA is higher than what is reported in the published article. These corrections did not alter any of the article's conclusions. (The following abstract of the original article appeared in record 2016-06820-001). The literature to date has predominantly focused on the benefits of ethical leader behaviors for recipients (e.g., employees and teams). Adopting an actor-centric perspective, in this study we examined whether exhibiting ethical leader behaviors may come at some cost to leaders. Drawing from ego depletion and moral licensing theories, we explored the potential challenges of ethical leader behavior for actors. Across 2 studies which employed multiwave designs that tracked behaviors over consecutive days, we found that leaders' displays of ethical behavior were positively associated with increases in abusive behavior the following day. This association was mediated by increases in depletion and moral credits owing to their earlier displays of ethical behavior. These results suggest that attention is needed to balance the benefits of ethical leader behaviors for recipients against the challenges that such behaviors pose for actors, which include feelings of mental fatigue and psychological license and ultimately abusive interpersonal behaviors. (PsycInfo Database Record (c) 2026 APA, all rights reserved).
title_cn: 对Lin等人（2016）“当伦理领导行为走向恶化：伦理领导行为如何通过自我耗竭和道德许可变得虐待”的更正。
abstract_cn: 报告了Szu-Han (Joanna) Lin、Jingjing Ma和Russell E. Johnson在《应用心理学杂志》（2016年6月，卷101第6期，815-830）中发表的文章《当伦理领导行为走向恶化时：伦理领导行为如何通过自我耗竭和道德许可转变为虐待行为》的错误（见记录2016-06820-001）。在该文章中，几个均方根误差近似值（RMSEA）被错误报告。作者们不再能够访问数据以验证原始输出，但在手动重新计算后确认需要进行更正。在所有情况下，正确的RMSEA值均高于已发表文章中的报告值。这些更正并未改变文章的任何结论。（以下是原始文章的摘要，出现在记录2016-06820-001中）。迄今为止，文献主要集中在伦理领导行为对接受者（例如员工和团队）的益处上。本研究采用以行为者为中心的视角，考察了展现伦理领导行为是否会对领导者造成某种成本。基于自我耗竭和道德许可理论，我们探讨了伦理领导行为对行为者的潜在挑战。在两项采用多波设计的研究中，我们跟踪了连续几天的行为，发现领导者的伦理行为表现与次日虐待行为的增加呈正相关。这种关联是通过因其早期的伦理行为表现而导致的耗竭和道德信用的增加所中介的。这些结果表明，需要关注在伦理领导行为对接受者的益处与此类行为对行为者所带来的挑战之间取得平衡，这些挑战包括心理疲劳感、心理许可以及最终的虐待人际行为。（PsycInfo数据库记录（c）2026 APA，版权所有）。

title: Thinking and feeling about novelty: How cognition and emotion shape investment in novel ideas
abstract: Abstract While prior research on the strategic framing of innovation highlights the cognitive mechanisms underlying novelty evaluation, we know little about the corresponding emotional mechanisms. Drawing on appraisal theory, construal level theory, and the literature on emotions, we theorize two distinct appraisal‐emotion pathways through which the framing of novel ideas evokes hope and awe among investors with different motives. We argue that high‐construal framing supplements economically motivated investors' low‐level feasibility orientation, which evokes hope and increases their willingness to invest. By contrast, low‐construal framing supplements non‐economically motivated investors' high‐level desirability orientation, which evokes awe and increases their willingness to invest. We test and find some support for these within‐motive pathways across three studies. Our study offers new theoretical and practical insights on the strategic framing of novel ideas.
title_cn: 关于新奇的思考与感受：认知与情感如何影响对新想法的投资
abstract_cn: 摘要 以往关于创新战略框架的研究强调了新颖性评估背后的认知机制，但我们对相应的情感机制知之甚少。基于评估理论、构念层次理论以及情感文献，我们理论化了两条不同的评估-情感路径，通过这些路径，新颖想法的框架能够在具有不同动机的投资者中引发希望和敬畏。我们认为，高层次的框架补充了经济动机投资者的低层次可行性导向，从而引发希望并增加他们的投资意愿。相反，低层次的框架补充了非经济动机投资者的高层次可取性导向，从而引发敬畏并增加他们的投资意愿。我们在三项研究中进行了测试，并发现对这些动机内路径的支持。我们的研究为新颖想法的战略框架提供了新的理论和实践见解。

title: Tobin Tax Policy, Housing Speculation, and Property Market Dynamics
abstract: Hong Kong introduced a Tobin property tax—the Special Stamp Duty (SSD)—in 2010, which substantially increased the selling costs of short-term residential property holders. This study examines the effectiveness of this Tobin tax in curbing speculation and cooling down the housing market. We find that the SSD effectively curtails flippers who hold homes for less than two years and reduces their market presence from 23.2% in 2009% to 2.4% in 2011 and 0.9% in 2013. However, one year after implementing the tax, housing prices grow by 12.64% and 15.76% in the primary and secondary markets, respectively, indicating a lack of a market cooling effect. Flippers strategically defer sales to circumvent the SSD charges, resulting in the sharp bunching of urgent sales immediately after the lock-in period ends. Further, the SSD effectively increases selling costs and prolongs potential sellers’ holding periods, thereby significantly reducing liquidity and driving up prices in the secondary market. The unintended externality is that the unmet housing demand from the secondary market triggers a buying frenzy in the primary market, which increases the prices in the primary market as well. Our findings have policy implications for the viability of Tobin taxes for regulating real estate markets. This paper was accepted by Agostino Capponi, finance. Funding: S. Agarwal was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72495154]. Supplemental Material: The internet appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.00370 .
title_cn: 托宾税政策、住房投机与房地产市场动态
abstract_cn: 香港于2010年引入了托宾财产税——特别印花税（SSD），这大幅增加了短期住宅物业持有者的出售成本。本研究考察了这一托宾税在遏制投机和降温房地产市场方面的有效性。我们发现，SSD有效地限制了持有房产不足两年的投机者，其市场占比从2009年的23.2%降至2011年的2.4%和2013年的0.9%。然而，在实施税收一年后，住宅价格在一手和二手市场分别增长了12.64%和15.76%，表明缺乏市场降温效果。投机者策略性地推迟销售以规避SSD费用，导致在锁定期结束后立即出现大量紧急销售。此外，SSD有效地增加了出售成本并延长了潜在卖家的持有期，从而显著降低了流动性并推高了二手市场的价格。意外的外部性是，二手市场未满足的住房需求引发了一手市场的抢购狂潮，进一步推高了一手市场的价格。我们的研究结果对托宾税在调节房地产市场的可行性具有政策启示。本文已被金融学者阿戈斯蒂诺·卡波尼接受。资助：S. Agarwal获得了中国国家自然科学基金的支持[资助号72495154]。补充材料：互联网附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.00370获取。

title: Exchange-Traded Funds and the Wash Sale Loophole
abstract: Tax wash sale rules prohibit the recognition of capital losses when substantially identical securities are sold and immediately repurchased within short windows. This study examines whether institutional investors use exchange-traded funds (ETFs) to circumvent wash sale rules. Consistent with tax-motivated demand for ETFs, incumbent ETFs both create more shares and experience more trading volume upon the introduction of nearly identical ETFs, particularly when recent returns are negative. We show that tax-sensitive institutions’ investment in highly correlated ETFs has proliferated in recent years, exceeding a quarter of their assets under management. Furthermore, tax-sensitive institutions holding more ETFs are significantly more likely to engage in swapping nearly identical ETFs. This swapping behavior has become widespread, with tax-sensitive institutional investors swapping $417 billion of nearly identical ETFs since 2001. We estimate that tax-sensitive institutions realized more than $84 billion dollars in losses in highly correlated ETFs associated with the swapping activity since 2001. This paper was accepted by Shiva Rajgopal, accounting. Funding: The authors thank their institutions for financial support. M. Dambra thanks the Kenneth W. Colwell endowment for research support, C. M. C. Lee thanks the Kermit O. Hanson endowment for research support, and P. J. Quinn thanks PricewaterhouseCoopers for research support. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06944 .
title_cn: 交易所交易基金与洗售漏洞
abstract_cn: 税收洗售规则禁止在短时间内出售和立即回购实质上相同的证券时确认资本损失。本研究考察了机构投资者是否利用交易所交易基金（ETFs）来规避洗售规则。与对ETFs的税收动机需求一致，现有ETFs在引入几乎相同的ETFs时，不仅创造了更多的份额，而且交易量也显著增加，尤其是在近期收益为负时。我们显示，税收敏感型机构对高度相关的ETFs的投资在近年来迅速增长，已超过其管理资产的四分之一。此外，持有更多ETFs的税收敏感型机构更有可能进行几乎相同ETFs的互换。这种互换行为已变得普遍，自2001年以来，税收敏感型机构投资者已互换了4170亿美元的几乎相同的ETFs。我们估计，自2001年以来，税收敏感型机构在与互换活动相关的高度相关ETFs中实现了超过840亿美元的损失。本文已被Shiva Rajgopal接受，属于会计领域。资助：作者感谢其机构的财政支持。M. Dambra感谢Kenneth W. Colwell基金会的研究支持，C. M. C. Lee感谢Kermit O. Hanson基金会的研究支持，P. J. Quinn感谢普华永道的研究支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06944获取。

title: Do Carbon Emissions Affect Stock Returns? Causal Evidence from a Supreme Court Ruling
abstract: Considering the importance of corporate carbon emissions, the Supreme Court of the United States ruled against the Environmental Protection Agency (EPA) and curtailed EPA’s regulatory powers by unprecedentedly invoking the “major questions doctrine” in its judgment of West Virginia v. EPA in 2022. We find that the stock prices of firms with greater exposure to carbon risk increased relative to firms with lower exposure after the Supreme Court verdict. The results are more pronounced for firms subject to higher federal climate enforcement intensity prior to the court ruling. Long-term climate commitments by state governments and carbon-sensitive institutional investors attenuate the effect. Both cash flow and discount rate contribute to the climate risk effect in firm value. Overall, our findings from this landmark climate litigation suggest that climate transition risks can affect stock prices. This paper was accepted by Lin William Cong, finance. Funding: Funding support by Hong Kong General Research Fund [Grant 17501825] is gratefully acknowledged. This work was supported by National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 72172082 and 72342021 (C. Shan)]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06732 .
title_cn: 碳排放是否影响股票回报？来自最高法院裁决的因果证据
abstract_cn: 考虑到企业碳排放的重要性，美国最高法院在2022年对西弗吉尼亚州诉环保局案的裁决中，裁定反对环境保护局（EPA），并前所未有地引用“重大问题原则”来限制EPA的监管权力。我们的研究发现，受碳风险影响较大的公司的股价在最高法院裁决后相对于受碳风险影响较小的公司有所上升。对于在法院裁决前受到更高联邦气候执法强度影响的公司，这一结果更加明显。各州政府的长期气候承诺和对碳敏感的机构投资者减弱了这一影响。现金流和折现率都对企业价值中的气候风险效应有所贡献。总体而言，我们在这起具有里程碑意义的气候诉讼中的发现表明，气候转型风险能够影响股价。本文由林威廉·孔（Lin William Cong）接受，研究领域为金融。资助：感谢香港一般研究基金[资助号17501825]的资助支持。本研究得到了中国国家自然科学基金[资助号72172082和72342021（C. Shan）]的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.06732获取。

title: Private Equity, Consumers, and Competition: Evidence from the Nursing Home Industry
abstract: This paper studies how product market competition shapes the impact of private equity (PE) acquisitions on consumers. We examine nursing home buyouts and observe that PE-owned facilities exhibit greater competitive sensitivity: competing more aggressively when competitive incentives are strong and exploiting market power more aggressively when competitive incentives are weak. We find that PE-owned facilities are more sensitive to local market competition—even when comparing effects only across facilities purchased as part of the same acquisition—and are more responsive to a pro-competitive policy helping consumers compare facilities. This suggests that regulators should attend to the competitive sensitivity of acquirers and the concentration of markets where acquisitions occur, as well as consider pro-competitive policies to mitigate or even reverse PE’s potentially adverse consequences. This paper was accepted by Carrie Chan, healthcare management. Funding: This work was supported by the UCLA Price Center for Entrepreneurship and Innovation and the UCLA Fink Center for Finance and Investment. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01486 .
title_cn: 私募股权、消费者与竞争：来自养老院行业的证据
abstract_cn: 本文研究了产品市场竞争如何影响私募股权（PE）收购对消费者的影响。我们考察了养老院的收购情况，观察到PE拥有的设施表现出更强的竞争敏感性：在竞争激励强烈时更积极地竞争，而在竞争激励较弱时则更积极地利用市场权力。我们发现，PE拥有的设施对地方市场竞争的敏感性更高——即使在仅比较作为同一收购的一部分而购买的设施时也是如此——并且对帮助消费者比较设施的促进竞争政策反应更为积极。这表明，监管机构应关注收购方的竞争敏感性以及收购发生市场的集中度，同时考虑促进竞争的政策，以减轻甚至逆转PE可能带来的不利后果。本文由Carrie Chan接受，主题为医疗管理。资助：本研究得到了加州大学洛杉矶分校创业与创新普赖斯中心和加州大学洛杉矶分校芬克金融与投资中心的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01486 获取。

title: EXPRESS: Will Machines Take Over? Algorithms for Human-Machine Collaborative Decision Making in Healthcare
abstract: Despite significant advancements in predictive artificial intelligence (AI), organizations continue to grapple with determining the most effective integration of AI into their operations, particularly in combining AI with human capabilities in task execution. This paper introduces a diagnostic system aimed at minimizing costs while maintaining patient safety in hospitals by efficiently allocating mammography interpretation tasks between AI algorithms and radiologists. The optimal diagnostic system employs algorithm-generated risk scores for mammograms to determine if additional assessment by a radiologist is necessary. It evaluates the costs of two approaches—automation, where AI completely replaces human interpretation, and delegation, where AI and radiologists share interpretation tasks–compared to the current expert-alone strategy. When AI performance does not exceed that of radiologists, the optimal design is a simple two-threshold policy: AI recommends no follow-up for low-risk cases, recommends follow-up for high-risk cases, and delegates ambiguous cases in between to radiologists; the thresholds are analytically derived and state-independent. This two-threshold policy is state-independent and that optimal thresholds are not contingent on the diagnostic system’s prior history. We demonstrate our system’s performance by back-testing against real-life scenarios, utilizing data from a mammography AI contest and real-world cost and performance metrics. Backtesting demonstrates potential cost savings of up to 20.9% compared to the expert-alone approach. Beyond radiology imaging, our work holds significant implications for the design of workflows in the AI era and human-machine collaboration contexts.
topics: Artificial Intelligence in Healthcare and Education
title_cn: 表达：机器会接管吗？医疗保健中人机协作决策的算法
abstract_cn: 尽管预测性人工智能（AI）取得了显著进展，组织仍然面临如何有效整合AI与人类能力以执行任务的挑战。本文介绍了一种诊断系统，旨在通过在AI算法和放射科医生之间有效分配乳腺X光检查解读任务，来降低成本并维护医院的患者安全。该最优诊断系统利用算法生成的乳腺X光检查风险评分来判断是否需要放射科医生进行额外评估。它评估了两种方法的成本——自动化，即AI完全取代人工解读，以及委托，即AI与放射科医生共享解读任务——与当前的专家单独策略进行比较。当AI的表现未超过放射科医生时，最优设计为简单的双阈值政策：AI对低风险病例不建议后续检查，对高风险病例建议后续检查，并将模棱两可的病例委托给放射科医生；这些阈值是通过分析推导的，并且与状态无关。该双阈值政策是状态无关的，最优阈值不依赖于诊断系统的先前历史。我们通过对真实场景的回测来展示系统的性能，利用来自乳腺X光AI竞赛的数据以及现实世界的成本和性能指标。回测结果表明，与专家单独方法相比，潜在的成本节省可达20.9%。除了放射影像学，我们的研究对AI时代的工作流程设计和人机协作背景具有重要的启示。

title: To Adopt or Not: The Paradox of AR Fitting Technology in Retail Channels
abstract: As brick-and-mortar retail rebounds, congestion in fitting rooms has reemerged as a critical operational challenge. Augmented reality (AR) fitting applications offer a scalable solution by enabling rapid virtual trials and reducing in-store delays, yet imperfect assessments may increase product mismatches. This study provides actionable guidance for retailers on AR adoption and pricing strategies by clarifying the economic roles of the substitution and complementarity effects. Our findings underscore the importance of a market-contingent approach to AR adoption and system upgrades. Rather than presuming that improvements in accuracy or usability will uniformly enhance performance, retailers and IT managers should rigorously evaluate how technological capabilities interact with market size, price fluctuations, and congestion dynamics. We also inform targeted marketing by demonstrating how heterogeneity in consumer technology preferences shapes channel selection and effective transaction outcomes. More broadly, our results caution policymakers that emerging digital technologies—while intended to reduce friction—may generate unintended welfare losses if mismatch risks and strategic responses are overlooked. These insights provide actionable guidance for digital transformation initiatives in retail and other capacity-constrained service systems characterized by heterogeneous consumers.
title_cn: 采用还是不采用：零售渠道中增强现实试穿技术的悖论
abstract_cn: 随着实体零售的复苏，试衣间的拥堵再次成为一个关键的运营挑战。增强现实（AR）试衣应用提供了一种可扩展的解决方案，通过快速的虚拟试穿来减少店内延误，但不完美的评估可能会增加产品不匹配的风险。本研究为零售商提供了关于AR采用和定价策略的可行指导，通过阐明替代效应和互补效应的经济角色。我们的研究结果强调了基于市场情况的AR采用和系统升级的重要性。零售商和IT经理不应假设准确性或可用性的提高会均匀地提升绩效，而应严格评估技术能力如何与市场规模、价格波动和拥堵动态相互作用。我们还通过展示消费者技术偏好的异质性如何影响渠道选择和有效交易结果，来为有针对性的营销提供信息。更广泛地说，我们的结果提醒政策制定者，尽管新兴数字技术旨在减少摩擦，但如果忽视不匹配风险和战略响应，可能会产生意想不到的福利损失。这些见解为零售及其他以异质消费者为特征的容量受限服务系统的数字化转型倡议提供了可行的指导。

title: More Can Be Less: The Economics of Answer Viewing on Paid Q&A Platforms
abstract: Paid Q&A platforms increasingly experiment with an answer-viewing feature that allows users to pay a small fee to access answers already given to others. At first glance, this model appears to expand access and create new revenue streams. Our research, however, shows that the reality is more complex. Using a game-theoretic model, we demonstrate that answer viewing can sometimes harm platform profits due to market cannibalization: Users who might have paid for personalized answers switch to cheaper viewing options. Surprisingly, we find that answerers may raise their consulting fees when platforms share a large portion of viewing revenue with them, and users do not always benefit because personalized answers become more expensive. These results reveal a central paradox—more can be less—as adding another monetization channel may backfire. For practice, our findings highlight the need for Q&A platforms to carefully calibrate revenue-sharing policies to avoid undermining their core market. For policy, the study underscores the importance of safeguards to protect small knowledge providers when platform incentives diverge from those of answerers and users. Beyond Q&A, the insights apply to broader contexts where platforms repackage personalized services into standardized products.
title_cn: 更多可能是更少：付费问答平台上答案查看的经济学
abstract_cn: 付费问答平台越来越多地尝试一种答案查看功能，允许用户支付少量费用以访问已提供给其他用户的答案。乍一看，这种模式似乎扩大了访问权限并创造了新的收入来源。然而，我们的研究表明，现实情况更为复杂。通过使用博弈论模型，我们证明答案查看有时会因市场蚕食而损害平台利润：那些本可能为个性化答案付费的用户转向了更便宜的查看选项。令人惊讶的是，我们发现当平台与回答者分享大量查看收入时，回答者可能会提高他们的咨询费用，而用户并不总是受益，因为个性化答案变得更加昂贵。这些结果揭示了一个核心悖论——更多可能变成更少——因为增加另一个货币化渠道可能适得其反。对于实践而言，我们的发现强调了问答平台需要仔细调整收入分享政策，以避免削弱其核心市场。对于政策而言，这项研究强调了在平台激励与回答者和用户的激励出现分歧时，保护小型知识提供者的重要性。超越问答，这些见解适用于更广泛的背景，即平台将个性化服务重新包装为标准化产品的情况。

title: Other People’s Children: How Diversity Without Inclusion Impacts Community Support for Public Schools
abstract: Organizations pursuing activities that advance the public interest often require support from their local communities, but such support may be harder to come by in more racially diverse communities. In this study, we argue that this negative effect of racial diversity on support for organizations serving the public interest will be weaker the more inclusive the community, especially where community inclusion is accompanied by shared values among members of different groups and where the organizations themselves are racially representative. We test and find support for these predictions by looking at one specific type of public service organization: public schools in the United States. Specifically, we find that community support for public schools—both generally in terms of local spending per pupil and specifically as the bond amounts residents vote to approve—is negatively associated with racial diversity within a school district, but this negative relation only holds for less inclusive communities where members of different groups are less likely to live close to each other or to have social ties with each other. We further find that this moderating effect of community inclusion is complemented by shared values and organizational representativeness, so that diversity has the most negative effect in less inclusive communities where members of different races differ in their political beliefs and schools are relatively segregated, and no significant effect in inclusive communities with shared values and integrated schools. Our study sheds new light on the conditions under which organizations seeking to address grand challenges can benefit from strong community support. Funding: This work was supported by the Carlson School of Management [DEI Research Grant] and the Responsible Research in Business and Management [Dare to Care Scholorship]. Supplemental Material: The online appendices are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19351 .
title_cn: 他人的孩子：缺乏包容的多样性如何影响社区对公立学校的支持
abstract_cn: 追求促进公共利益活动的组织通常需要来自当地社区的支持，但在种族多样性更高的社区中，这种支持可能更难获得。在本研究中，我们认为种族多样性对支持服务公共利益组织的负面影响将在社区包容性更强时减弱，尤其是在社区包容性伴随不同群体成员之间的共同价值观，以及组织本身具有种族代表性的情况下。我们通过研究美国的一种特定类型的公共服务组织——公立学校，来检验并支持这些预测。具体而言，我们发现对公立学校的社区支持——无论是就每位学生的地方支出而言，还是居民投票批准的债券金额而言——与学区内的种族多样性呈负相关，但这种负相关关系仅在包容性较差的社区中成立，在这些社区中，不同群体的成员不太可能彼此近距离居住或建立社会联系。我们进一步发现，社区包容性的调节效应与共同价值观和组织代表性相辅相成，因此，在包容性较差的社区中，不同种族的成员在政治信仰上存在差异，学校相对隔离时，种族多样性对支持的负面影响最为显著，而在具有共同价值观和融合学校的包容性社区中则没有显著影响。我们的研究为寻求解决重大挑战的组织在何种条件下能够获得强大社区支持提供了新的视角。资金支持：本研究得到了卡尔森管理学院[DEI研究资助]和负责任的商业与管理研究[敢于关心奖学金]的支持。补充材料：在线附录可在https://doi.org/10.1287/orsc.2024.19351获取。

title: Waiting for the Right Offer: Laboratory Evidence on How News Affects Bargaining
abstract: We conduct a series of laboratory experiments to examine whether the gradual exogenous revelation of sellers’ private information influences the occurrence of trades in a bilateral bargaining setting with a static lemon condition. We find that, although information does not increase efficiency, it reduces the likelihood that buyers incur losses when trading with low-quality sellers. Anticipating that additional signals will arrive, buyers hesitate to finalize deals immediately and exhibit a “waiting for news” effect, making sizable offer adjustments only when sufficient positive signals have accumulated. In contrast, informed sellers are less sensitive to news but appear to wait for the offer that they deem acceptable. This paper was accepted by Dorothea Kübler, behavioral economics and decision analysis. Funding: T. Ding initiated this project while at the Shanghai University of Finance and Economics and thanks the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grant 72173076] for financial support. S. F. Lehrer thanks the Social Science and Humanities Research Council of Canada for research support. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07224 .
title_cn: 等待合适的提议：关于新闻如何影响谈判的实验室证据
abstract_cn: 我们进行了一系列实验室实验，以考察卖方私人信息的逐步外生揭示是否会影响在静态柠檬条件下双边讨价还价环境中的交易发生。我们发现，尽管信息并未提高效率，但它降低了买方在与低质量卖方交易时遭受损失的可能性。由于预期会有更多信号到来，买方在立即达成交易时表现出犹豫，出现了“等待消息”的效应，只有在积累了足够的正面信号后才会进行较大的报价调整。相比之下，知情的卖方对消息的敏感度较低，但似乎会等待他们认为可接受的报价。本文由多萝西娅·库布勒（Dorothea Kübler）接受，涉及行为经济学和决策分析。资助信息：丁涛（T. Ding）在上海财经大学发起了该项目，并感谢中国国家自然科学基金[资助号72173076]的财务支持。S. F. 莱赫尔（S. F. Lehrer）感谢加拿大社会科学与人文学科研究委员会的研究支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.07224获取。

title: Beyond O(T) Regret: Decoupling Learning and Decision Making in Online Linear Programming
abstract: Breaking the [Formula: see text] Barrier in Online Linear Programming How can fast first-order methods for online linear programming (OLP) match the performance of more computationally intensive LP-based approaches? In the paper “Beyond [Formula: see text] Regret: Decoupling Learning and Decision Making in Online Linear Programming,” the authors develop a new framework that improves the regret guarantees of scalable first-order algorithms for online linear programming. They show that when the dual problem satisfies a mild error bound condition, first-order methods can achieve [Formula: see text] regret, including [Formula: see text] in continuous support settings and [Formula: see text] in finite support settings. The key insight is to decouple learning and decision making. The algorithm first learns an approximate dual solution and then localizes decisions to a neighborhood around that solution using an adaptive procedure. This decoupling narrows the gap between efficient gradient-based methods and LP-based benchmarks, providing strong theoretical guarantees while maintaining scalability for applications such as revenue management, online advertising, and cloud computing.
title_cn: 超越O(T)遗憾：在在线线性规划中解耦学习与决策制定
abstract_cn: 突破在线线性规划中的[公式：见文本]限制 快速的一阶方法如何能够在在线线性规划（OLP）中与更为计算密集型的基于线性规划的方法相匹配？在论文《超越[公式：见文本]后悔：在线线性规划中学习与决策的解耦》中，作者们提出了一个新的框架，改善了可扩展的一阶算法在在线线性规划中的后悔保证。他们展示了当对偶问题满足弱误差界限条件时，一阶方法可以达到[公式：见文本]的后悔，包括在连续支撑条件下的[公式：见文本]和在有限支撑条件下的[公式：见文本]。关键的洞察是将学习与决策进行解耦。算法首先学习一个近似的对偶解，然后使用自适应程序将决策局限于该解附近的一个邻域。这个解耦缩小了高效基于梯度的方法与基于线性规划的基准之间的差距，提供了强有力的理论保证，同时保持了在收益管理、在线广告和云计算等应用中的可扩展性。

title: EXPRESS: Waiting Time Externality Awareness in Socially Responsible Queueing
abstract: In service systems, customers tend to overutilize resources, resulting in high congestion. We study a noncoercive way to alleviate congestion based on customers’ awareness of the negative waiting externalities they impose. To this end, we revisit Naor’s rational-queue model by adding a term that captures the cost a customer associates with the waiting time generated for other customers encountered during their sojourn. First, we show that this modification preserves the threshold structure of customers’ joining strategy. Using lattice-path counting techniques, we derive a closedform expression for the expected generated waiting time, conditional on the number of customers observed upon arrival. The generated wait is increasing and concave in the queue length at arrival. Viewing expected waiting time as allocated across arrivals, the queue length associated with an arbitrary unit of expected generated waiting time is first-order stochastically lower than the queue length associated with a unit of expected personal waiting time. We prove that the maximum generated wait is increasing and convex in the joining threshold and provide tight bounds with exact light/heavy traffic asymptotics. Internalizing social awareness (weight on generated wait) lowers the joining threshold and reduces waiting; in high-demand regimes, it can also increase social welfare. When the operator can also influence the weight on personal wait, that lever reduces congestion more strongly than waiting externality awareness. Finally, we quantify the awareness level needed to reach Naor’s social threshold and show that it is lowest at a non-extreme demand level.
title_cn: 表达：社会责任排队中的等待时间外部性意识
abstract_cn: 在服务系统中，客户往往会过度利用资源，从而导致高拥堵。我们研究了一种非强制性的方法来缓解拥堵，基于客户对其造成的负面等待外部性的认知。为此，我们重新审视了Naor的理性排队模型，通过添加一个项来捕捉客户与其在逗留期间为其他客户产生的等待时间相关的成本。首先，我们证明了这一修改保持了客户加入策略的阈值结构。利用格路径计数技术，我们推导出了在到达时观察到的客户数量条件下，期望生成等待时间的封闭形式表达式。生成的等待时间随着到达时的队列长度增加而增加并且是凹的。将期望等待时间视为在到达之间分配，与任意单位的期望生成等待时间相关的队列长度，在概率上是比与单位期望个人等待时间相关的队列长度要低的。我们证明了最大生成等待时间在加入阈值上是递增和凸的，并提供了与确切轻/重交通渐近值相符的紧密界限。内化社会意识（对生成等待的权重）降低了加入阈值并减少了等待；在高需求情况下，这也可以提高社会福利。当运营者能够影响个人等待的权重时，该杠杆比等待外部性意识更强地降低拥堵。最后，我们量化了实现Naor社会阈值所需的意识水平，并显示在非极端需求水平下这是最低的。

title: EXPRESS: Scheduling Additive Manufacturing Systems: Complexity and Algorithms to Minimize the Number of Late Parts
abstract: Additive Manufacturing (AM) is a process by which three-dimensional products are made via the addition of material in a layer-by-layer fashion. This manufacturing technique is growing in commercial usage given its advantages in creating very dense or complex geometries as well as highly customizable components. In healthcare, for example, AM can be used to improve patient outcomes by providing timely medical devices (or parts) required for treatments. Minimizing the number of late parts in this context will directly improve the patients’ welfare. This paper studies the nesting and scheduling problem within the AM context and shows the problem of minimizing the number of late parts is strongly NP-hard even if the nesting of parts-into-jobs is given. We also develop efficient algorithms to minimize the number of late parts, both when nesting is fixed beforehand and when nesting is part of the algorithm. The theoretical results, including algorithm performance bounds, developed in this paper are new contributions to the literature. An extensive computational study evaluates the performance of both algorithms. The nesting and scheduling algorithm performs within 7% of the lower bound on average and shows an effective way to nest and schedule systems containing challenging problem instances. Providing efficient, high-performing algorithms such as these will allow AM managers to quickly schedule parts for AM production with a minimum number of late parts and consequently improve both customer satisfaction and profitability of the firm.
title_cn: 表达：调度增材制造系统：降低晚点零件数量的复杂性与算法
abstract_cn: 增材制造（AM）是一种通过逐层添加材料来制造三维产品的过程。这种制造技术因其在创建非常密集或复杂的几何形状以及高度可定制的组件方面的优势而在商业使用中不断增长。在医疗领域，例如，增材制造可以通过提供治疗所需的及时医疗设备（或部件）来改善患者的治疗结果。在这种情况下，减少迟交部件的数量将直接提升患者的福利。本文研究了增材制造背景下的嵌套与调度问题，并证明了即使给定部件到作业的嵌套，最小化迟交部件数量的问题仍然是强NP难题。我们还开发了有效的算法，以减少迟交部件的数量，既适用于预先固定嵌套的情况，也适用于嵌套作为算法的一部分的情况。论文中提出的理论结果，包括算法性能界限，是对文献的新贡献。此外，广泛的计算研究评估了这两种算法的性能。嵌套与调度算法在平均情况下的表现与下界相差7%，并展示了针对具有挑战性问题实例的嵌套和调度系统的有效方法。提供像这样的高效、高性能算法将使增材制造管理者能够快速调度AM生产的部件，最小化迟交部件的数量，从而提高客户满意度和公司的盈利能力。

title: The duality of duality: Generative and disruptive climate configurations for innovation
abstract: Organizational climate is seen as a key driver of organizational performance, including sustained innovation. However, there is limited work on the effects of climate duality on innovation. The co-existence of two distinct climate dimensions (duality) in an organization creates the potential for both generative and disruptive dualities. By dividing the innovation process into an idea generation stage and an innovation implementation stage, we develop a theory linking climate duality and the generative–disruptive dichotomy at each stage of the innovation process. In particular, we argue that climate duality should be generative at the idea stage and disruptive at the implementation stage. Using data from the 2018 Australian Public Service Employee Census ( N = 59,870), we test the distinct effects of climate duality at each stage. We conclude with a discussion of the implications of these findings for theories of work climate and innovation. • Advance workplace climate research with a configurational approach examining interactions among multiple workplace climates • Theorize relationship between duality (co-existence of go-getter and inclusive climates) and stages of innovation process • Use Australian Public Service Employee Census to show climate duality benefits idea generation (a divergent process) • Find climate duality hinders implementation (a convergent process), revealing paradoxical effects on innovation • Extend theories of climate duality and innovation to public organizations, contributing to cross-sector understanding
title_cn: 双重性的双重性：创新的生成性和颠覆性气候配置
abstract_cn: 组织气候被视为组织绩效的关键驱动因素，包括持续创新。然而，关于气候二元性对创新影响的研究相对有限。组织内两个不同气候维度的共存（二元性）为生成性和破坏性双重性创造了潜在可能性。通过将创新过程分为构思阶段和实施阶段，我们发展了一个理论，将气候二元性与创新过程每个阶段的生成性-破坏性二分法联系起来。我们特别认为，气候二元性在构思阶段应表现为生成性，而在实施阶段应表现为破坏性。利用2018年澳大利亚公共服务员工普查的数据（N = 59,870），我们检验了气候二元性在每个阶段的独特影响。最后，我们讨论了这些发现对工作气候和创新理论的意义。 • 通过配置方法推进工作场所气候研究，考察多种工作场所气候之间的互动 • 理论化二元性（追求型气候与包容型气候的共存）与创新过程各阶段之间的关系 • 利用澳大利亚公共服务员工普查数据展示气候二元性有利于构思生成（一个发散过程） • 发现气候二元性阻碍实施（一个聚合过程），揭示对创新的悖论性影响 • 将气候二元性和创新理论扩展至公共组织，为跨部门理解做出贡献。

title: Pathways to upscaling: aligning capabilities with supply chain design in automotive manufacturing
abstract: Purpose Taking innovation to scale and accelerating the development of new technologies puts pressure on manufacturers to perform frequent ramp-ups in increasingly volatile markets. Such pressures inevitably bring the role of supply chain right at the centre of the challenge to design supply chains that are ready to upscale. This research aims to explore how manufacturers can design their supply chain and deploy the required capabilities to respond to the upscaling demands. Design/methodology/approach Drawing on the dynamic capabilities (DCs) theory, this study develops a conceptual framework which is validated through multiple case studies. Data was collected and analysed from 14 upscaling projects in automotive manufacturing. Findings This study identified specific DCs (e.g. dynamic relational capabilities) that manufacturers deployed in their upscaling projects, explored their micro-foundations, showed how these are coupled with different supply chain designs (SCDs) and how those matches evolve over time. A distinctive finding is the need for automotive manufacturers involved in innovative and technological upscaling projects, to move away from the traditional binary SCD choice (i.e. modular vs integral) to a less rigid SCD which we called “evolving SCD” and proved to be particularly valuable for companies with limited resources and evolving market positions. Practical implications This research outlines actionable pathways for upscaling and offers guidance on aligning SCD with capabilities. The findings also illustrate how managers can leverage temporal configurational shifts to strategically address evolving priorities from initial market entry concerns like IP protection and capability access, to later-stage challenges around supplier reliability and volume capacity. Originality/value This study introduces the concept of the evolving SCD which is particularly suitable for start-up companies in meeting the upscaling requirements. This research enriches the understanding on how to manage upscaling projects by offering fresh empirical insights into how manufacturers can successfully upscale by streamlining the SCD with capabilities.
title_cn: 扩大规模的途径：在汽车制造中将能力与供应链设计对齐
abstract_cn: 目的：将创新扩大规模并加速新技术的发展，使制造商在日益波动的市场中面临频繁增产的压力。这种压力不可避免地将供应链的角色置于设计准备好扩展的供应链挑战的中心。此次研究旨在探讨制造商如何设计其供应链并部署所需的能力，以应对扩展需求。设计/方法论：本研究基于动态能力（DCs）理论，开发了一个概念框架，并通过多个案例研究进行了验证。数据采集和分析来自14个汽车制造领域的扩展项目。发现：本研究识别出了制造商在扩展项目中部署的具体动态能力（例如，动态关系能力），探讨了其微观基础，展示了这些能力与不同的供应链设计（SCD）如何结合，以及这些匹配如何随时间演变。一个显著的发现是参与创新和技术扩展项目的汽车制造商需要摆脱传统的二元供应链设计选择（即模块化与整体化），转向一种不那么严苛的供应链设计，我们称之为“演变型供应链设计”，该设计对于资源有限和市场位置变化的公司尤其有价值。实践意义：本研究概述了可行的扩展路径，并提供了关于将供应链设计与能力对齐的指导。研究结果还展示了管理者如何利用时间上的配置变化，战略性地应对从最初市场进入时关注的知识产权保护和能力获取，到后期阶段围绕供应商可靠性和产能等挑战的演变优先事项。原创性/价值：本研究引入了演变型供应链设计的概念，这种设计特别适合初创公司满足扩展要求。此次研究丰富了对如何管理扩展项目的理解，提供了新的实证见解，说明制造商如何通过将供应链设计与能力精简对接，从而成功实现扩展。

title: Battlelines of Accountability: The Discursive Production of Digital Responsibility
abstract: Abstract Public inquiries have become pivotal arenas in which the ethical responsibilities of digital platforms are publicly constructed and contested. Yet scholarship has paid limited attention to the linguistic mechanisms through which these contests unfold. This paper examines the 2024 Australian Joint Select Committee on Social Media and Australian Society as a high-stakes moral forum in which technology firms, regulators, and civil society actors engage in discursive struggles over adolescent harm and platform responsibility. Drawing on a qualitative analysis of more than 3000 pages of submissions and hearing transcripts, we show that accountability in this setting is not simply revealed but actively produced through language. Extending prior research on dialogic accountability, we incorporate Searle’s speech act theory to identify how presuppositions and indirect speech acts function as micro-level tools for shaping epistemic contests about what harms occur and responsibility contests about who ought to be held to account. Our findings demonstrate that corporate actors often deploy these linguistic devices to maintain ambiguity, diffuse blame, or perform symbolic responsibility, while legislators and advocates use them to assert duties, establish harms, and press for substantive accountability. We argue that “digital responsibility” emerges as a contingent discursive accomplishment rather than an intrinsic organizational property, highlighting the performative and strategic nature of ethical claims in contemporary platform governance. By theorizing accountability as a linguistically mediated moral practice, the paper advances business ethics scholarship on discursive legitimation, contributing to ongoing debates about how societies should evaluate and regulate the conduct of powerful digital firms.
topics: Ethics and Social Impacts of AI
title_cn: 问责的战线：数字责任的论述生产
abstract_cn: 摘要 公众调查已成为数字平台伦理责任被公开构建和争议的重要场所。然而，学术界对这些争议展开的语言机制关注有限。本文考察了2024年澳大利亚社交媒体和澳大利亚社会联合特别委员会，作为一个高风险的道德论坛，技术公司、监管机构和公民社会参与者在其中就青少年伤害和平台责任展开话语斗争。基于对3000多页提交材料和听证会记录的定性分析，我们展示了在这一背景下的问责制并非简单被揭示，而是通过语言积极产生的。我们扩展了关于对话式问责的先前研究，将Searle的言语行为理论融入其中，以识别预设和间接言语行为如何作为微观层面的工具，塑造关于发生何种伤害及谁应被追究责任的认识论争夺。我们的发现表明，企业行为者往往利用这些语言手段维持模糊性、分散责任或表演象征性的责任，而立法者和倡导者则利用它们主张职责、确立伤害并推动实质性问责。我们认为，“数字责任”作为一种依赖于话语的成果而非内在于组织的属性出现，突显了当代平台治理中伦理主张的表演性和战略性。通过将问责理论化为一种语言介导的道德实践，本文推动了关于话语合法化的商业伦理研究，为关于社会应如何评估和监管强大数字公司的行为的持续讨论做出了贡献。
